from source import pascal

def test_pascal_row_lengths_for_three():
    rows = pascal(3)
    expected_lengths = [1, 2, 3]
    actual_lengths = [len(row) for row in rows]
    assert actual_lengths == expected_lengths, f"Expected row lengths {expected_lengths}, got {actual_lengths}"
